mapper.select:
SELECT ID, DEPT_ID, ROLE_NAME, STATUS, DELETED, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME, ROLE_CODE, ROLE_SORT, MENU_CHECK_STRICTLY, DEPT_CHECK_STRICTLY, DATA_SCOPE, REMARK, ROLE_CLASS, DEPT_NAME, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, update_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM sys_role
ID = #{ID}
SELECT MENU_ID FROM SYS_ROLE_MENU WHERE ROLE_ID = #{id}
select A.ID as id, A.DEPT_NAME as label, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(B1.ID) FROM SYS_DEPT B1 WHERE B1.PARENT_ID = A.ID) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isAlwaysShow from SYS_DEPT A WHERE PARENT_ID = #{parentId}
SELECT DEPT_ID FROM SYS_ROLE_DEPT WHERE ROLE_ID = #{id}

SELECT A.ID, A.USER_ACCOUNT, A.USER_NAME FROM SYS_USER A LEFT JOIN SYS_ROLE_USER B ON A.ID = B.USER_ID WHERE
B.ROLE_ID = #{roleId}
B.ROLE_ID != #{roleId} or B.ROLE_ID is null
AND ((A.USER_ACCOUNT like '%' || #{nameOrAccount} || '%') OR (A.USER_NAME like '%' || #{nameOrAccount} || '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role( ID, DEPT_ID, ROLE_NAME, STATUS, DELETED, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME, ROLE_CODE, ROLE_SORT, MENU_CHECK_STRICTLY, DEPT_CHECK_STRICTLY, DATA_SCOPE, REMARK, ROLE_CLASS, DEPT_NAME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{roleName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deleted, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now}, #{roleCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roleSort, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{menuCheckStrictly, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptCheckStrictly, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dataScope, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roleClass, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
